ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the student belongs to */,
  "batch" TEXT /* Batch or semester the student is in */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the course (e.g., ET137) */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course (e.g., MATHEMATICS) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department that offers the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits associated with the course */,
  "max_marks" INTEGER /* Maximum marks possible for the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who achieved the grade */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course for which the grade was achieved */,
  "marks_obtained" INTEGER /* Marks obtained by the student for the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade achieved by the student (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "grade_point" REAL /* Grade point value for the grade */,
  "max_grade_points" REAL /* Maximum grade points achievable for the course */,
  "grade_remark" TEXT /* Additional remarks on the grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being offered */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "instructor" TEXT /* Instructor teaching the course */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the course */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number where the course is held */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the course offering (active/inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gpa_calculations" (
  "gpa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPA entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student for whom the GPA is calculated */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA calculated for the student */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester for which the GPA is calculated */,
  "cumulative_gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA of the student */,
  "gpa_remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks on the GPA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gpa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gpa_calculations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (student, instructor, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
